author: @allcingeye5881
text: Sorry to burst your bubble mate but I alone may be able to knock off a lot of views 1, I love your work and they need to be played many many times to understand the info, 3 many more time because the sound is not great but it has improved. which is fine but dose mean we have to watch you many many times. 4, you remind me of a great British actor   Bill Owen (compo)  and one day Nora Batty is going to run in and bash you over the head, I must add a you are a younger Bill Owen and of course Not Dead (R.I.P) Bill . hope you and the team are well, your a inspiration. and do you sell your resistive  ink on line cheers.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: no worries mate - I am glad you like the vids at least lol - I am afraid we don't sell the inks buut we have done a couple of vids on how to make them

replies.author: @allcingeye5881
replies.text:
HI I did do some looking on ebay lol for the graphite to make it out of, or to find an ink but grades size of partials type's and even tough I just do a few experiments it seems you soon build up quite a collection of minerals ect. so I like to try and get the right stuff first time. lol I wish. 

Rob  Many times I have made videos just to say to the world if I can do it any one can I watched myth busters doing there best to make a hho generator and they achieved some tiny amount. So i made one and put the video of it. So if I can whip the myth Busters just think what people  in the industry must be able to do. my best from the land of the mini car

author: @leokimvideo
text: Thank god, you have just highlighted the biggest mistake 95% producers make here, I learned a very bitter lesson early on that the videos I like to make and enjoy watching never flew on this site. It wasn't until I made the very thin wedge of material that works my channel started to take off. Pulling of a huge viral video is difficult, but it's also pointless. In the end there is no value in these videos as everyone just rips them and puts them up as their content. The new danger right now is what facebook is doing via facebook video. I have found it near impossible to have ripped videos pulled down from facebook video. Facebook video is becoming a huge threat to YouTube, in view numbers and attention spans. So much content on facebook video is ripped, stolen YouTube producer content. So my number one tip and it's super important. Put a large watermark of your channel name in your videos. Because no one who steals your videos is ever going to give you credit, or income the stolen video generates.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: +leokimvideo That is a good point mate - i will start doing that from now - nice share - thanks mate

author: @asvtv3472
text:
Another good video Robert, I can honestly say that your right. ive watched many of your videos because your talking on several subjects that im interested in or working on or soon will be. Also I have made several comments and you have answered 9 out of ten of which I am very grateful and I find the two way communication very helpful if not very supportive of my comment to which I am grateful.

my very best to you and I will continue to watch and re watch many of your videos.

Regards
chris armstrong

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: ASV TV hiya Chris - i try to answer all - but sometimes they get missed - for which i apologise - the main aim of the channel is to encourage people to get out there and try - i know this can be difficult - but i hope i help people do exactly that

replies.author: @asvtv3472
replies.text: Well I can say that I personally am very similar to you in that I need hands on to learn and remember but there are simply something's/ mini road block of non understanding for which your videos and responses really help keep me going rather than stopping me in my tracks because I don't know, cant find on google etc etc so thanks Robert.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: ASV TV i am glad it helps mate

author: @JohnnyForehead
text:
You're just an all-around cool guy. Interesting, affable, infinitely curious, intelligent straight shooter with a great presentation style and original content. I purchased some of your material just because I like you and want to support your channel. Never underestimate the power of likeability.
Now, if you want your rankings to shoot through the stratosphere, then all you need to do is show a little more cleavage.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: lol - next video is in a bikini - though given my cleavage that's like to drop views through the floor - lol - thanks for the support mate - it's well appreciated

author: @jprice1122
text: What brings me as a subscriber and a fan is  - #1 content...  You address energy issues.  This is by far the most important talking point for me.  #2 accessibility, you don't speak "down" to people, you make your point, and point watchers in the right direction to learn for themselves.  #3 - the accent.  Being raised in a military family I have come to love the sound of a different enunciation or dialect.  You just sound exotic to my Kansas born ears.  And thank you for your responses...  It does make me feel connected and "part of the team". - Cheers!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: Lol - thanks for the feedback - it's funny i don't even think I have an accent lol

text: Explosions always help your ranking LOL

author: @bernardstokes6550
text: what,in my opinion, makes your channel shine above the others of a similar genre is the quality of information, presentation and enthusiasm. Getting to the point....often you will view something of interest and spend several minutes covering matters of no significance or relevance...this does not happen with your presentations. Your channel is one of quality and deserves the success it achives....thanks for your valued  offerings and clear logical thinking.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: cheers mate - I did set doing this because there just wasn't the information i wanted in the videos I was watching and I figured there should more to it - it's nice to know it's appreciated
